{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032318481771A1A2697F3162499164\"}"},"total":6},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7418566133029077822","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好好好好好好好"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1727275856,"group_id":"6992173076771245070","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzO9FpQdyHKXjiTEyzyhslk=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/3abe6a50e39b4bf1ba7c29f33074e1a8~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"50008925932","user_name":"段十一子"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"50008925932","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"6992173076771245070","book_info":{"abstract":"一觉醒来，刘梦变成了赵桓，大宋的皇太子，宋徽宗的儿子，未来的宋钦宗……上有醉心书画，不理政事的便宜老爹，下有权奸蔡京童贯，祸乱朝纲，外面还有辽金铁骑，虎视眈眈……既然这样，没什么好说的，我命由我不由天！未来，既然还没发生，一切都有可能！我赵桓，就是要改变，这大宋百年的羸弱之局！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/76d497c99ae7af86dce38e7558e6fc2e","author":"小龙家水哥","author_id":"","book_id":"6992173076771245070","book_name":"回到宋朝当皇帝","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#402818","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"潜力好书","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":273,\"name\":\"历史古代\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=273\u0026name=历史古代\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":37,\"name\":\"穿越\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37\u0026name=穿越\u0026genre_type=0\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"cat
